project.name: Tampa Bus Stop Shade Study
project.description: A reusable shade inventory project seeded with Tampa-area GTFS stops, shade classifications, and heat-context fields.
project.owners: Open transit and climate research contributors

taxonomy.name: No Shade
taxonomy.description: No shade visibly reaches the waiting area.

taxonomy.name: Limited Shade
taxonomy.description: Vegetation shades part of the waiting area, but not most of it.

taxonomy.name: Significant Shade
taxonomy.description: Vegetation visibly covers most of the waiting area or seating area.

taxonomy.name: Needs Review
taxonomy.description: The stop needs imagery, review, or disagreement resolution.

methodology.title: Bus Stop Shade Study
methodology.summary: Preparing a reproducible, city-wide shade inventory from GTFS bus stop data.
methodology.purpose: This project helps researchers, transit agencies, and municipalities collect, review, visualize, and publish standardized bus stop shade datasets.
methodology.shade_method: Classifications should describe visible shade reaching the passenger waiting area, not merely nearby trees or structures. Store raw labels and consensus labels so future reviewers can reproduce decisions.
methodology.data_sources:
- GTFS stops and routes
- Expert or crowdsourced shade labels
- Optional environmental, demographic, and transportation overlays
methodology.contributors: Project team, reviewers, and community contributors
methodology.citation:
Dataset release:
    Author or Organization. (Year). Title of dataset or study release (Version number) [Data set]. Publisher. URL
methodology.bibliography:
Works referenced:
    Author, A. A., & Author, B. B. (Year). Title of article. Title of Journal, volume(issue), page range. https://doi.org/xxxxx
    Author or Organization. (Year). Title of report. Publisher. URL
methodology.limitations: Imagery date, time of day, season, and reviewer uncertainty can affect shade labels. Published releases should document these limitations.
methodology.release_history: - 0.1.0: Draft project configuration and starter dataset

voting.title: Help document this stop
voting.description: Use your current observation of the passenger waiting area. Choose the shade coverage that best matches this stop.
voting.question: What is the current shade coverage at this stop?
voting.source_question: What creates the shade at this stop? Select all that apply.
voting.success_message: Thank you. Your observation has been recorded.

import_log.source: Seed Tampa GTFS and shade CSV
